evidence.scientific_clarity: Scatter + OLS fit with R²=0.877 annotated in-figure; OursModel highlighted at target operating point; axes labeled.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype setting in gen_figure.py; matplotlib defaults to DejaVu Sans with no explicit font family override.
evidence.palette: Tol qualitative palette (#0077BB, #CC3311, #EE7733) — colorblind-safe; no green/red directional misuse.
evidence.layout_density: 5.5×4.2 figure with tight_layout(pad=0.6); legend lower-right, stats box upper-right; OursModel annotation offset avoids overlap.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches computed slope/intercept/R²; legend present; OursModel labeled with coordinates; palette noted in caption.
evidence.vector_fidelity: Script saves figure.pdf but lacks matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42; text not guaranteed selectable or editable in PDF/SVG.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption gives slope=-0.0449, intercept=0.6209, R²=0.877 with interpretation as strong log-linear Chinchilla scaling.

overall_strengths: Colorblind-safe Tol qualitative palette correctly applied throughout figure and documented in caption.
Caption provides specific numerical findings (slope, intercept, R²) matching the figure annotation.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype settings means text in PDF/SVG outputs is not guaranteed to be selectable or editable.
No explicit font family override; figure uses matplotlib DejaVu Sans default rather than a publication-quality typeface.
